## MainScrollItem.observeItem() method

Initialises the element visibility observation, stopping the previous one if it has.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
observeItem(newObserver: ScrollVisibilityObserver | null, oldObserver: ScrollVisibilityObserver | null): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  newObserver | [ScrollVisibilityObserver](./x-components.scrollvisibilityobserver.md) \| null | The new observer for the HTML element. |
|  oldObserver | [ScrollVisibilityObserver](./x-components.scrollvisibilityobserver.md) \| null | The old observer for the HTML element. |

<b>Returns:</b>

void
